properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: I must tell Jesus! I must tell Jesus! I cannot bear my burdens alone; I must tell Jesus! I must tell Jesus! Jesus can help me, Jesus alone.

verse.name: v3
v4
v5
verse.lines: O how the world to evil allures me! O how my heart is tempted to sin! I must tell Jesus, and He will help me Over the world the vict’ry to win.
